Award Winning Cosmetic Clinic

Your Beauty,

Our Passion.

As Seen In

£100 OFF New Clients

Get Voucher Code

An Award Winning Doctor Led Cosmetic Clinic

Situated Just Behind Selfridges on Oxford Street

We believe confidence starts with feeling like the best version of yourself - refreshed, empowered, and authentically you. Our clinic was created with a simple philosophy: to deliver natural, transformative results through expert care, advanced techniques, and an uncompromising focus on safety. Our experienced doctors have performed thousands of procedures to date.
We specialise in non-surgical cosmetic treatments with a particular focus on natural, full facial rejuvenation in additon to being recognised Endolift(R) experts - restoring balance, structure, and vitality while preserving what makes you uniquely you. Rather than treating individual concerns in isolation, we take a holistic, full-face approach to achieve results that are subtle, harmonious, and genuinely transformative.
Every journey at NEU begins with listening. No two faces are the same, which is why each consultation is bespoke - carefully tailored around your goals, concerns, and lifestyle before recommending a personalised treatment plan.
Our highly trained practitioners combine medical expertise with an artistic eye, using only premium, clinically proven products and the latest industry advancements. Our work and expert insights have been featured in a number of high-profile publications, including Vogue , HELLO! Magazine , and Marie Claire , reflecting our reputation for excellence and trusted results in addition to over 500+ 5 star reviews.
At NEU, we don’t follow trends or believe in overdone aesthetics. We believe in refinement, balance, and confidence that feels effortless. From your first consultation to your aftercare, you’ll experience a discreet, professional, and welcoming environment - where you feel informed, comfortable, and genuinely cared for at every step.

"I believe you deserve to feel good about yourself; to admire the person who looks back at you in the mirror."

Dr Tony Kaliya MBChB | Founder

Our Transformations

Full Facial Rejevenation

Full Facial Rejevenation

Full Facial Rejevenation

Endolift(R)

Endolift(R)

UK Leading Full Facial Rejuvenation & Endolift(R) Experts

At our clinic, we specialise in advanced, non-surgical facial rejuvenation designed to enhance your natural beauty with precision and artistry. Our award-winning approach focuses on full-face harmony-treating the face as a whole rather than isolated areas-to deliver refined, balanced, and truly natural-looking results.
By combining expertly placed dermal fillers with our signature techniques, we restore volume, lift and contour key areas of the face, softening lines while preserving your unique features. As recognised Endolift(R) experts , we go beyond traditional treatments by incorporating cutting-edge laser technology to tighten skin, stimulate collagen, and improve definition at a deeper structural level.
This comprehensive approach allows us to address both the visible signs of ageing and the underlying causes, creating results that are subtle, long-lasting, and tailored entirely to you. With a commitment to safety, innovation, and premium products, we deliver rejuvenation that looks effortless-never overdone.

Situated Behind Selfridges,

Every look we design for our patients is created upon the same belief: every person is unique, and deserves to feel good about themselves.

The NEU(R) Difference

Say Hello to Happiness

Step 1

Book a FREE Consultation

We require new patients to attend a consultation so we can better understand what it is you are MOST concerned about. Need flexibility? Sure, we can move your appointment around if you let us know within 48 hours of your booking. We do require a card on file in the event you do not show up to your appointment and fail to move or cancel the appointment.

Step 2

Come on Over

It’s time to come in and meet us for your consultation! We’ve created a safe, comfortable and relaxed space so you can feel at home. This is your opportunity to get to know our doctors, and share your aspirations. We ask that during this stage you keep an open mind, because you may have a vision but our doctors could advise differently based on their assessment of you.

Step 3

Start Your Plan

You’ve had your consultation, you’re excited, and we’re all happy with your treatment plan - now it’s time to make the magic happen. This can either be started in the same session as your consultation or at a more convenient date. With each visit, you’ll notice your self-esteem rising as we enhance your natural beauty, bringing symmetry and harmony to your appearance.

Book Your FREE Consultation Today!

BOOK A FREE CONSULTATION

A dedicated doctor-led cosmetic Clinic

Situated behind Selfridges in Marylebone

Situated in the prestigious Marylebone area of London here at NEU Clinic, you will be treated by a team of highly experienced doctors who will guide you on your treatment journey. We are dedicated to providing you with a holistic experience using high quality, proven cosmetic treatments that are completely tailored to you.

Featured In

We believe you deserve to feel good about yourself; to admire the person who looks back at you in the mirror.

Natural Looking Results Only.

We believe confidence starts with feeling like the best version of yourself - refreshed, empowered, and authentically you. Our clinic was created with a simple philosophy: to deliver natural, transformative results through expert care, advanced techniques, and an uncompromising focus on safety. Our experienced doctors have performed thousands of procedures to date.
We specialise in non-surgical cosmetic treatments with a particular focus on natural, full facial rejuvenation - restoring balance, structure, and vitality while preserving what makes you uniquely you. Rather than treating individual concerns in isolation, we take a holistic, full-face approach to achieve results that are subtle, harmonious, and genuinely transformative.
Every journey at NEU begins with listening. No two faces are the same, which is why each consultation is bespoke - carefully tailored around your goals, concerns, and lifestyle before recommending a personalised treatment plan.
Our highly trained practitioners combine medical expertise with an artistic eye, using only premium, clinically proven products and the latest industry advancements. Our work and expert insights have been featured in a number of high-profile publications, including Vogue , HELLO! Magazine , and Marie Claire , reflecting our reputation for excellence and trusted results in addition to over 500+ 5 star reviews.
At NEU, we don’t follow trends or believe in overdone aesthetics. We believe in refinement, balance, and confidence that feels effortless. From your first consultation to your aftercare, you’ll experience a discreet, professional, and welcoming environment - where you feel informed, comfortable, and genuinely cared for at every step.

Featured In

A Doctor with a Purpose

Dr Tony Kaliya

MBChB Founder & Medical Director | GMC: 7561320

Dr. Tony Kaliya is an award-winning specialist in cosmetic medicine renowned for delivering natural, transformative results with cutting-edge aesthetic techniques. With an exceptional eye for detail and a meticulous approach to facial artistry, he has become a leading name in advanced cosmetic procedures having performed thousands of procedures to date.
His work and expert insights have been featured in a number of high-profile publications, including Vogue , Hello! Magazine , and Marie Claire , further cementing his reputation as a trusted authority in the cosmetic medicine industry.
Dr. Kaliya has worked across several prestigious central London clinics, including Harley Street , where he specializes in transformative full facial rejuvenation procuderes and advanced Endolift (R) procedures using advanced, highly technical techniques . He is dedicated to achieving subtle yet impactful facial transformations , restoring youthfulness while preserving individuality. HIs philosophy is centered on precision treatments that enhance natural beauty , ensuring that each client achieves an incredibly natural rejuvenated look.
Dr. Kaliya also has a passion for preventative healthcare and is the founder of Neuwell -a preventative healthcare company utilizing the world’s most advanced diagnostic technologies. Neuwell enables people to detect diseases years in advance, before symptoms develop, with a mission to help people live longer, healthier, and happier lives.

corpus.footerText:
ou. With a commitment to safety, innovation, and premium products, we deliver rejuvenation that looks effortless-never overdone.

Treatment Videos

View All Videos

Reviews

Don't Just Take Our Word For It!

Check out what our amazing clients say about us..

Read All Reviews

Obagi Medical Skincare

Hydrators & Moisturisers

Cleansers

Toners

Serums & Actives

Situated Behind Selfridges,

Every look we design for our patients is created upon the same belief: every person is unique, and deserves to feel good about themselves.

The NEU(R) Difference

Say Hello to Happiness

Step 1

Book a FREE Consultation

We require new patients to attend a consultation so we can better understand what it is you are MOST concerned about. Need flexibility? Sure, we can move your appointment around if you let us know within 48 hours of your booking. We do require a card on file in the event you do not show up to your appointment and fail to move or cancel the appointment.

Step 2

Come on Over

It’s time to come in and meet us for your consultation! We’ve created a safe, comfortable and relaxed space so you can feel at home. This is your opportunity to get to know our doctors, and share your aspirations. We ask that during this stage you keep an open mind, because you may have a vision but our doctors could advise differently based on their assessment of you.

Step 3

Start Your Plan

You’ve had your consultation, you’re excited, and we’re all happy with your treatment plan - now it’s time to make the magic happen. This can either be started in the same session as your consultation or at a more convenient date. With each visit, you’ll notice your self-esteem rising as we enhance your natural beauty, bringing symmetry and harmony to your appearance.
